figures.caption: Fig. 1. The VNVSPEC framework. High-level requirements enter from users or from standards-derived catalogs and pass a quality gate. They are decomposed into module-level requirements with explicit metrics and further into test cases whose results are captured as evidence records by existing test tools. Every link is an edge in a traceability DAG. Assessment rolls evidence up the graph into verdicts and produces role-specific outputs: compliance matrices for auditors, CI reports for developers, and GSN assurance cases for safety engineers.
